description: SQL injection via URL-encoded input: encodeURIComponent does not protect against SQLi. Tests that the taint engine correctly preserves SQL_QUERY cap through URL encoding.

expected.notes: req.query.q flows through encodeURIComponent into client.query — URL encoding strips URL_ENCODE cap but SQL_QUERY cap remains, so finding is produced. Mismatch note depends on symex reaching the sink with a string-renderable Encode expression.
